message:
feat(gateway): add history tracking service

Implements history tracking system for agent interactions:
- Create history service with entry management and querying
- Add REST endpoints for /history (list, search, stats, export)
- Implement output extraction (code blocks, URLs, JSON, errors, custom)
- Support starring, replaying, and pruning history entries
- Add token estimation and statistics tracking
- Include 29 tests for extraction and stats functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
